headline: Is It Time To Reconsider Expedia Group (EXPE) After Strong Multi Year Share Price Gains
summary: Wondering if Expedia Group at around US$235 per share is still priced for opportunity or already assuming the best case? This article breaks down what the current market price might be implying. The stock has had a mixed run recently, with a 3.0% return over the last 7 days, 15.4% over the past month, a 16.9% decline year to date, and a 36.4% return over the last year, set against a much stronger 162.4% return over 3 years and 34.7% over 5 years. Recent headlines around online travel demand,...
